common_provisions: All states include anti-waiver clause: no questionnaire/acknowledgment can waive claims under state franchise law or disclaim reliance on franchisor statements

Michigan notice (in front matter, not addenda) provides: no prohibition on joining franchisee associations, no release waiving rights, good cause required for termination (30-day cure), fair compensation on non-renewal, no arbitration outside MI
